entry.title: Focused Build SP15: Improvements in Mass Change Operations Fiori Application
entry.content:
Introduction

We have released Service Pack(SP) 15 of Focused Build (ST-OST) earlier this month and as all ways with the new SP a lot of exciting and valuable features have been added to our Focused Build fiori applications. You can find more information about all the improvements in different areas of the Requirements-to-deploy process in the blog detailed out here.

In this blog post let's discuss the enhancements which are delivered in Mass Change Operations fiori application (MCA) in detail.

Addition of Tester and Test Team for Work Packages and Work Items

Prior to ST-OST 15 the Tester and Test Team fields were missing from work packages process type and Test Team was missing from work items process type of Mass Change Operation application. This behaviour was not in sync with the My Work Packages and My Work Items generic applications. We have added these fields now in MCA in filter bar, result list table and mass change dialog sections. With the addition of these fields now it is possible to filter the result list table of work packages and work items by Tester and Test Team fields. It is also now possible to edit these field values directly in the result list table and also from mass change dialog. The download excel feature also supports these two fields now.

Fig 1. Tester and Test Team in FilterBar

Fig 2. Tester and Test Team in Mass Change Dialog

Also, both the Tester and Test Team fields are interdependent on each other by default. That means if a Test Team is selected and we try to search the Tester for the same work package or work item then only the testers which are part of the selected Test Team are returned. This behaviour is also extended to generic apps along with the Developer and Development Team fields. If you wish to switch off this interdependency between these fields then it can be done by setting the below two parameters in our AGS_WORK_CUSTOM parameter table.

  • FB_DEV_TEAM_DISABLE - Set this parameter with the value X for switching off dependency between Developer and Development Team
  • FB_TEST_TEAM_DISABLE - Set this parameter with the value X for switching off dependency between Tester and Test Team

Please note, once you switch off this dependency from the mentioned fields then it would apply for these fields across all process types in generic app, mass change operations app and requirements management app.

Date format harmonization

All the applications under the Focused Build Requirement-to-Deploy portfolio contain date fields in their screens. However, it was observed that the date values in these fields were displayed in different formats for different applications. 

Respecting the Fiori guidelines, the date format for all fields has been harmonized across all the applications with SP15. 

Fig 3. MCA old date format

Fig 4. MCA new date format

Fig 5. Generic app new date format

In the Mass Change Operations application, the users can now also search for Work Packages and Work Items by 2 new filters, Created at and Changed at. These columns are also a part of the result list. 

Fig 7. MCA harmonized date range maintenance

Fields editability harmonization

One more new feature in Focused Build that enhances the editability of fields in the Mass Change Application and Generic Application. This update streamlines the management of Work Packages, Work Items, Request for Change, and Change documents by allowing fields to be editable under specific statuses and read-only under others. Most fields are managed through status-dependent customization. You can access this via: 

SPRO->SAP Solution Manager->Capabilities-> Requirements Management-> Change Request Management Framework->Configure status-dependent UI element control.

Fig 6. Status dependent editability of fields

Customization for Project and Wave: Existing UI elements are reused for project and wave customization. For all other fields, new UI elements are created with "/SALM" namespace. Currently these customization settings apply exclusively to the Mass Change Application and Generic Application.

For a comprehensive list of fields that can be edited under specific statuses, please refer to the Field Editability Matrix available on the SAP Support Portal. You can access it via: 

Product Details -> Product Capabilities -> Functions in Detail ->Editability of fields in Mass Change Operations (xlsx) 

This feature is designed to improve efficiency and reduce errors by providing the right level of control over your workflows. 

Key Takeaways

  • Missing fields Tester and Test Team are added in MCA for work packages and work items with added dependency by default.
  • Date and date range fields are harmonized across all the applications.
  • Field editability is harmonized in MCA for certain process types to overcome the past shortcomings.

Please feel free to provide feedback either directly here in the comment section or, in case of questions, you can submit them here. You are also encouraged to follow SAP Solution Manager tag  here and Focused Build for SAP Solution Manager tag  here. 

Important Links and Resources

  • Usage Rights
  • SP15 delta presentation to get an overview of the changes and read the highlights blog
  • SP15 delivered features overview blog
  • Read how SAP Activate and Focused Build with SAP Solution Manager is working together
  • ALM Community page

entry.title: SAP B1 in Canada is it possible to turn of AP Invoice Tax rounding
entry.content: We have a client in Canada, using TAX defined as 13%, but when the users enters the actual TAX amount on Vendor Invoice, when we post the invoice the document amount changes when posted due to the system rounding the TAX

entry.title: Re: Interplay between Vite and SAP Approuter
entry.content:
Hello Julian,

Thank you very much for the great blog for the developers who will use ReactJS with CAP.

For local development; It can be good if you also add "authenticationMethod" to the xs-app.json file.

Ex:

 

"authenticationMethod": "none"

 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: AGGREGATION ON CDS VIEW and Filtering data with where clause issue
entry.content:
Thanks it will resolve to some extend by removing unwanted record in below example where lgort = L100 but didn't fix fully as it will do the SUM at lgort level. meaning if lgort is having 2 values on selection screen say L101 & L201 then matnr having 2 SUM entries one for L101 and other one for L201. expectation is it should SUM both lgort values and show one entry.

matnr = M1001, werks = W001, lgort = L100, lbst = 10,  

matnr = M1001, werks = W001, lgort = L101, lbst = 10,

matnr = M1001, werks = W001, lgort = L101, lbst = 20,

matnr = M1001, werks = W001, lgort = L201, lbst = 10,

Result is

matnr = M1001,  lbst = 30,

matnr = M1001,  lbst = 10,

expected

matnr = M1001,  lbst = 40,

I somehow tried to make ITAB also CDS and joined in CDS1 and added lgort in CDS2 to make it available for filter (as per your reply) 

Define view ZCDS1
as select distinct from mard

inner join ITAB_CDS on ITAB_CDS.matnr = mard.matnr and ITAB_CDS.werks = mard.werks
{
key matnr,
key werks,
key lgort,
labst
}

Define view ZCDS2

as select from ZCDS1

{
key matnr,

 lgort,
sum(labst) as stock
} group by matnr

In report:

select ZCDS2~matnr
          ZCDS2~stock
from ZCDS2
inner join ZCDS1 on ZCDS1~matnr = ZCDS2~matnr
 where ZCDS2~lgort in @s_lgort
into table @DATA(lt_stock).

entry.title: Re: Capacity Planning Production Order should not release...
entry.content:
Hi Tejas,

You can use Fiori Apps Capacity Scheduling Table, Capacity Scheduling Board and Manage Work Center Capacity to level the overload/capacity.

BR

SKAEAD

entry.title: How to Bind Applications to Pre-Existing Schemas in HANA Cloud (BTP Cloud Foundry)?
entry.content:
I recently migrated a HANA Service DB (BTP Neo) to HANA Cloud in BTP Cloud Foundry. In this setup, several schemas were created in the HANA Cloud database using a technical user.

Now, we have applications deployed in Cloud Foundry that need to access these schemas. I want to create service bindings between these applications and the pre-existing schemas in HANA Cloud.

Is it possible to create a service instance of type hana with the schema plan for an already existing schema? how can it be achieved?

If not, what would be the recommended approach to bind applications to pre-existing schemas?

how to use this template in case that business needs to do PI for specific HU within different storage Bins?

entry.title: Posting only possible in periods 2024/12 and 2024/10 in company code. Message No. M7053
entry.content:
Hi, Can anyone please assist me on this issue. When i enter the stock through MB1C am getting this issue. Posting only possible in periods 2024/12 and 2024/10 in company code. Message No. M7053.

Even I tried MMRV & MMPV to close and open the period. Still it didn't work.

entry.title: Regarding updating BLOB in BTP Cloud Hana DB via CAPM oData V4
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
We have a requirement to upload a file to the Hana DB Table in BTP Cloud. The table is created via CAP Model entity and the field is LargeBinary and annotated as MediaType (pdf).

Based on the CAP Entity, we have created Service file also and the oData V4 is generated successfully.

Now while trying to upload the file via file Uploader UI, the update is not happening.

As a troubleshoot method, we created a standard Fiori List Report and it worked as expected.

We would like to upload the file in our custom Freestyle application which sometimes ended up in Error 413 (request payload too large). The same oData service works from postman as well.

We also tried in two parts, Creating a record with UUID and then update the file with PUT  method. This also did not work as expected.

Attached the CAP, UI5 code etc.

Any help in this regards is highly appreciated.

Best Regards,

Vivek

entry.title: SAP PS Master Data Templates
entry.content:
Hello All

Where can I find the templates for SAP PS master data ?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: MDK 24.11 - Android crash everytime hit enter on an empty Simple Property
entry.content:
MDK 24.11

Android 14.0

If you press enter on Android Keyboard on an empty Simple Property, the app crash.

 

An uncaught Exception occurred on "main" thread.
Parameter specified as non-null is null: method com.sap.mdk.client.ui.fiori.common.MDKOnEditorActionListener.onEditorAction, parameter event

StackTrace:
java.lang.NullPointerException: Parameter specified as non-null is null: method com.sap.mdk.client.ui.fiori.common.MDKOnEditorActionListener.onEditorAction, parameter event
    at com.sap.mdk.client.ui.fiori.common.MDKOnEditorActionListener.onEditorAction(Unknown Source:8)
    at android.widget.TextView.onEditorAction(TextView.java:8255)
    at com.android.internal.inputmethod.EditableInputConnection.performEditorAction(EditableInputConnection.java:175)
    at android.view.inputmethod.InputConnectionWrapper.performEditorAction(InputConnectionWrapper.java:253)
    at android.view.inputmethod.RemoteInputConnectionImpl.lambda$performEditorAction$22(RemoteInputConnectionImpl.java:697)
    at android.view.inputmethod.RemoteInputConnectionImpl.$r8$lambda$Jl5UsxtFJ64KyE-rGTA_d_NwhC4(Unknown Source:0)
    at android.view.inputmethod.RemoteInputConnectionImpl$$ExternalSyntheticLambda32.run(D8$$SyntheticClass:0)
    at android.os.Handler.handleCallback(Handler.java:959)
    at android.os.Handler.dispatchMessage(Handler.java:100)
    at android.os.Looper.loopOnce(Looper.java:232)
    at android.os.Looper.loop(Looper.java:317)
    at android.app.ActivityThread.main(ActivityThread.java:8705)
    at java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Native Method)
    at com.android.internal.os.RuntimeInit$MethodAndArgsCaller.run(RuntimeInit.java:580)
    at com.android.internal.os.ZygoteInit.main(ZygoteInit.java:886)

Can you check please ?

entry.title: FI-AA: When added a new interval, the asset master not showing old interval
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I recently added a new interval in T-Code AS02 (Change Asset Master Record). Upon saving, an intracompany transfer document was automatically posted. However, I noticed that all the old intervals are no longer visible.

Could anyone guide me on how to view the history of interval changes in AS02 or related transactions?

Thank you in advance for your support!

entry.title: Re: Modify the Financial Review booklet
entry.content: Hello Stefan, is there a way to save the selected hierarchies on page level? Creating a view won't show the selected hierarchies on page level after re-opening the view that has been created.

entry.title: Re: SAP ALM API & Integration: Tasks/Defects/Requirements to Jira
entry.content:
Hi @Tripti10,

 

I’ve encountered similar findings during my implementation and testing process. The status synchronization limitation and the requirement for separate API calls were particularly noticeable. Implementing one of the suggested workarounds could help achieve smoother integration and better synchronization between SAP Cloud ALM and Jira.

 

Possible Workarounds

1. Middleware Component (SAP Cloud Integration):

• Develop a middleware component that processes requests from SAP Cloud ALM and sends the appropriate API calls to Jira, depending on the action type (e.g., status changes vs. general updates).

2. Jira Automation Rule:

• Use Jira Automation to fetch the current status from SAP Cloud ALM whenever changes are made and automatically update the corresponding Jira task.

 

Initial Task Synchronization

 

For the initial synchronization of tasks, it would be feasible to develop a custom Import Tool that:

• Creates Jira tickets based on tasks from SAP Cloud ALM.

• Establishes the corresponding links between the two systems.

• Performs the initial synchronization of data.

 

This approach would enable more tailored integration logic, aligned with specific project requirements.

 

Let me know what you think!

entry.title: Re: SAP PS Master Data Templates
entry.content: PS Project Structure Templates are not delivered by SAP because they are so industry and client specific.  You could research PMI (Project Management Institute) for possible examples.

entry.title: Webservice call error from S4HANA/ECC to BTP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Our requirement is to send data from ECC/S4HANA to SAP Integration Suite(CPI) where we generated URL after creating SOAP sender channel on CPI.

On SAP backend they are trying to generate Webservices in SOAMANAGER and when I try to ping the webservice after configuring CPI URL. Later, when I "Ping Webservice" from then it throws the following error(shown in screenshots).

Should we generate SSL certificates on CPI iflow level and then share with S4HANA/ECC Basis guys? Also should we ask Certificates from SAP backend to import it to CPI iflow level? 

Thanks,

Ramu.

entry.title: Re: Budget Controlling Not working in Recurring Journal E...
entry.content: Hi Venu, Sorry for reply late. Thanks for your guidance. I have tested and it worked. However, I can only receive the error message for the cost center budget in recurring journal entries if the tolerance is exceeded the usage %. Not the warning control working and posted without warning. Thanks..

entry.title: Re: How to Bind Applications to Pre-Existing Schemas in H...
entry.content: I think you can not do it directly. I mean you need to create a new hdi schema with synonyms that target objects in your existing "classic"  schemas. See https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud-database/sap-hana-cloud-sap-hana-database-developer-guide-for-cloud-foundry-multitarget-applications-sap-business-app-studio/enable-access-to-objects-in-remote-classic-schema

entry.content:
Hii @David_Chaviano 

I have completed my learning journey and shared such details to digitalskills@sap.com 

But still i haven't received the redemption code.Kindly look into this and help me through it. Looking forward from you

Thanks&Regards

Sanjay

entry.title: Re: Webservice call error from S4HANA/ECC to BTP CPI
entry.content: You can see an error "SSL handshake..." so yes, you have to install the CPI certificate in ECC STRUST if you want ECC to contact CPI (as it's usually done to consume any kind of Web service, not limited to CPI). Note that "Web service testing" from SOAMANAGER is limited as you can see in the log, see the note 1947516 for more information (1947516 - ESI - SOAMANAGER Ping Web Service returns HTTP error - SAP for Me).

entry.title: GRC PSS End user login link user provisioning issue by ECC CUA production system connector
entry.content:
We have GRC Dev, Quality and Production with ECC Dev, Quality and Production systems and BW, GTS, Gateway systems are also there.

ECC Production system is containing CUA, where it is master system and others are child systems.

In GRC Dev, Quality and Production GRC PSS is configured as end user can login in GRC PSS link with their security question and answer and they can unlock their id or reset password in CUA Parent or in child systems where their id exists.

In GRC DEV Users Authentication Data sources Connectors of ECC Dev, Quality and production are added, similarly in GRC quality also. But in GRC production only ECC production connector is added in Users Authentication Data sources.

Recently our ECC systems are upgraded to EHP7 and because of it from ECC production CUA, ECC dev and quality systems were disconnected till UAT and after ECC production upgradation to EHP7,  ECC Dev and Quality systems connected back with ECC Production CUA.

Now after this upgradation work now ECC production system users are not able to login in GRC PSS end user login link for their user id unlocking or password reset because through ECC production connector users provisioning is not working for login in GRC PSS link. Same issue is not getting with ECC Dev connector and ECC Quality connector. ECC Dev and ECC Quality system connector are working for users provisioning to login in GRC PSS link for users those exist in ECC Dev or in ECC Quality system.

But because all users exist in ECC production system and in GRC Production only ECC production connector is maintained in its Users Authentication Data sources, users are not able to login in GRC Production PSS link for their id unlocking or password reset, they are getting error message as “User XXXX does not exist in SAP system”.

ECC production system connector RFC is OK, RFC user id is system id with SAP_ALL and SAP_NEW access.

I am not able to find why ECC production system users provisioning is not happening by ECC production connector to login in GRC Production PSS link.

Till now I have tried 2 options to solve this problem.

  1. I have disconnected and reconnected GRC Production system from ECC Production system CUA, executed SCUG for GRC Production and executed Repository Object sync job in full synch mode in GRC production for its all connectors which include ECC production connector also.
  2.  As per below SAP note, I have Maintain CUA setting in GRC Dev system by maintaining CUA parent connector in CUA Global system and marked it Active and maintained Parent to child systems in CUA Model distribution and after this setting executed Repository Object Sync job in full sync mode in GRC Dev for its all connectors which includes ECC Production connector also. But after this CUA setting also user provisioning is not working by ECC production connector for its users.

SAP note: 2072086 - CUA User Provisioning from GRC to CUA Parent/Child

As per your experience in GRC, can you please help to find why user provisioning is not working for login in GRC PSS link by ECC production connector for its users?

Right now, ECC Development, Quality, Production are upgraded to EHP. But this provisioning issue is getting with ECC Production connector only.

entry.title: When trying to TECO order, error message "Open outbound delivery *** still exists...", what to do?
entry.content:
GI/GR goods movement documents are all OK after operation confirmation (with a few scraps, etc.).

How to handle the production order when getting error message as described in title.

Also, for Single-Order Staged components, if the production order is cancelled, after Clear PSA, do we need to create WT to move the component back to warehouse, or is it OK to keep in the PSA to be used for the next production order? why ours won't be reserved automatically? (All Batch-managed components are setup as Single-Order Staging).

entry.title: VA00 price condtion didn't show 2 items althought choose 2 characters
entry.content:
Hi Gays

I was confused with the variant price showing up in SO, although I chose 2 variants in SO, VA00 variant price had been maintained in VK11, but in SO, only shows the first variant's value in conditions sheet. 

there are two characters: 1. bread,  2. sauce.  check-in  "condition"  button, only show 1  and price VA00 ONLY show 1 for bread value in "condition" sheet. 

why?  I suppose it will show 2 value.

Would you please help me? is this issue a system issue?  What can I do?

Thanks a lot!

Grace

entry.content:
Hi,
we would like to post the RAR (Revenue Accounting & Reporting) journal including VAT. We are using the standard SD interface, so creating standard contracts and orders. The RAIs which are created do not include the tax information by default. Is there a way to solve this?

Thank you
Kenan

SKAE

entry.title: Cannot complete the default for Focused Build Defect Priority. Change from Very High to Medium
entry.content:
The Focused Build defect priority is set to equal the setting of the test script.  The test script defaults to very high which causes the defect to also default to very high.  The business users neglect to adjust the defect priority to medium or low; therefore, the objective is to default the defect priority to medium.  The default BAdi: /SALM/IF_TM_TWL_DEFECT_DEFAULT seems to be the correct place to complete this change; however, the coding for the BAdi is unclear.

The setting on the method GET_DEFECT_VALUES that was tested:

 

Does not properly match the Type required for the interface attributes:

What is the correct way to code the BAdi to default to Medium for the Defect Priority.

entry.title: Re: Webservice call error from S4HANA/ECC to BTP CPI
entry.content: With all three, you are sure. You need only the list of server certificates to trust in the client system. I don't know CPI so I can't say why it would require having the ECC server certificates.

entry.title: Re: ​​​​SAP Datasphere and Collibra: End-to-End Data Catalog Integration ​​​
entry.content: Great!

entry.title: Reimagining AI: Why Bigger Isn’t Always Smarter
entry.content:
In my last article, we explored how the scaling of AI is encountering significant roadblocks, with the law of diminishing returns coming into play. Despite adding more computing power and advanced algorithms, the "intelligence" of AI models is showing limited improvement.

Recently, I came across an insightful analysis by Ilya Sutskever, one of the co-founders of OpenAI, in a fascinating interview. His thoughts resonate deeply with the challenges we face today.

Key Takeaways from Sutskever’s Insights:

  1. Data as the New Fossil Fuel: Sutskever highlights a pressing issue—data is becoming a major bottleneck. The internet, once an abundant reservoir of training data, is now depleting its quality sources. He compares this to "fossil fuels," with good training data becoming increasingly scarce, as much of it has already been consumed.
  2. The Need to Look Beyond Pre-Training: He urges us to think beyond pre-training models and explore novel approaches like TTC (Train-Time Compression) or inference-time models. Synthetic data, while promising, has not yet succeeded in significantly enhancing model acceptance. Drawing a parallel to human evolution, Sutskever notes how smaller-brained early humans exhibited greater intelligence compared to larger-brained mammals like Neanderthals, emphasizing the importance of reasoning models. He discusses the emergence of reasoning-based models like O1, which we’ve previously explored, as the next frontier in AI.
  3. Rise of Autonomous Agents: Sutskever envisions a future where autonomous agents, designed for specific tasks, play a crucial role in advancing AI. These agents will possess self-reflection capabilities, enabling them to evaluate and improve their actions, ultimately paving the way for more self-aware and capable AI systems.

You can watch his analysis here.

A Macro View from Yuval Noah Harari:

Another must-watch discussion is Yuval Noah Harari’s thought-provoking interview on the role of AI in our future, where he delves into themes from his book, Nexus. Harari likens our current stage of AI development to the evolutionary leap from amoebas to dinosaurs—a process that spanned billions of years. However, in the case of AI, he believes this transformation could unfold in mere decades.

Harari emphasizes the profound implications AI could have on individuals, governments, and society at large. He advocates for a global dialogue, urging that everyone on Earth should have a voice in shaping the design and trajectory of AI, given its potential to impact every aspect of human life.

You can watch his interview here.

This thought-provoking discourse from Sutskever and Harari offers not just a glimpse of AI’s current challenges but also a hopeful roadmap for its future. It reminds us that innovation when guided by responsibility and collaboration, can shape a world where AI serves humanity in meaningful ways.

What are your thoughts on these ideas? Do you agree with the perspectives shared by Sutskever and Harari, or do you see other possibilities for AI's evolution? Share your opinions in the comments below—I’d love to hear from you!

If you enjoyed this blog and found it insightful, please share it with others. Together, we can spark a broader conversation about the future of AI and its impact on our world.

entry.title: Why do we need read entity in RAP ?
entry.content:
I am learning RAP, so I have a doubt that why do we need Read Entitiy in RAP . I understood that to read the data from BO. but we already had select stmt/modify/insert stmt for that. I could have written select from cds entity to get my data in an internal table(just assuming).

requesting your help on this. this could be silly question but as i am new it feels a lot to me. tnx in advance

entry.title: Re: message server (waha/3601) failed: MSENILAYER) error...
entry.content: I resolved this by wait on the error...checked the logs from sapinst_dev.txt and sapinst.txt from folder path shared which matched to above description .   I manually started  SAP servers as screenshot enclosed .. waited till it comes up green and then retry on error.. it worked for me ...

entry.title: Re: Event consumption model for custom RAP events created...
entry.content:
Hi Saurabh,

Absolutely. It's a very valid point. I spent almost two hours on this lovely Sunday morning trying to figure this out, but I think I found the clue. 🙂 The mechanism is obviously different between S/4HANA Public Cloud and S/4HANA On-Premise/Private Cloud.

Here's what we need to do, I hope:

  • Send the Event from S/4HANA On-Premise to SAP Event Mesh and Configure outbound bindings; check out How to Create RAP Business Events in SAP S/4HANA On Premise 2022 section Send the Event to SAP Event Mesh
  • Now we will need a metadata of the event to use in the SAP BTP's.
    • It seems an event need to be created in SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh; check out Events
    • Then Event API Product needs to be created; check out Event API Products > Creating an Event API Product
      • Event API Products allow you to expose important event assets to other development teams, external partners, and customers.
    • Then other steps, etc.
      • Adding an Event API Product to an Environment
      • Making an Event API Product Publicly Available
      • Downloading an Async API Document with Event API Product Information
        • An Async API document is a a JSON or YAML file generated according to the AsyncAPI Specification that describes the contents of an event API.
  • Then we can use the metadata in SAP BTP ABAP Environment to Create Event Consumption Model.

It is my hope that this information will prove useful to you. I wish you the best of luck!

Thanks,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hi Graziela or Carlos

Hi, when will the 2025 federal tax brackets be released by BSI/SAP?

entry.title: Re: Sysdate On default Prompt Date on SAP Universe
entry.content:
Hi there,

assuming you are using the .unx universe, you can create a parameter with a default like the one in the attached picture - my example gives you yesterday's date as the default

entry.title: Re: Why do we need read entity in RAP ?
entry.content:
Hi @das_shubhashish,

It's a good question! Once we start learning Entity Manipulation Language (EML), it's natural to wonder why we need to use EML, especially READ ENTITY, ENTITIES. 

The answer is simple. If there is a Business Object (BO) and its data model with CDS View Entities, then use READ ENTITY, ENTITIES in either local mode or external usage. I would strongly advise against using these BO's CDS View Entities directly.

Secondly, you will undoubtedly benefit from using READ ENTITY, ENTITIES in LOCAL MODE. This allows you to read affected entity instances and draft-enabled entity instances, among other advantages.

Furthermore, you can read data from not only the selected entities but also from associated entities either  IN LOCAL MODE and external. In this case, the BO has a root entity with one or more child and leaf entities.

Thanks,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: MDK 24.11 - Android crash everytime hit enter on an e...
entry.content: I have reproduced the problem and opened an internal issue to investigate and fix.

entry.title: Re: Why do we need read entity in RAP ?
entry.content:
Hi Subhashish,

A RAP BO(Business Object) is not just a CDS view. It usually represents a real-world artifact that has both a structure (1 or more CDS views with parent-child hierarchies/associations)  as well as a behaviour(operations and properties). 'Read Entities' which is a part of EML(Entity Manipulation Language) provides type-safe access to the RAP BO while abstracting the complexity of the underlying BO implementation from the developer.

More here:

Business Object

EML

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: SAP message error VL312 during an inbound delivery creation (transaction VL31N)
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

I'm getting an error when i start to create and inbound delivery in VL31N.

I already checked SAP note "3013989 - Not able to open the delivery in VL02N/VL03N due to error VL312"

I have the order type ZDL in field "TVLK-DAART"

and also in TVAK table that order type is defined.

I don't understand the reason of this error when i start the inbound delivery creation. Someone have a solution for this issue?

Thanks,

Best regards

Thanks in advance

BR

Haldun SECKIN

entry.title: Re: Why do we need read entity in RAP ?
entry.content:
it deals with transaction buffer, I believe.

imagine you are creating a record, it is not saved yet, will you get that record via querying cds?probably not, but Read entity will give that record, if I am not wrong.

same for update case, if update is not saved, querying cds will give u old data, read entity will give updated data in your session/transaction.

entry.title: Re: Extending SAPUI5 apps: Adaptation projects vs. Extension projects
entry.content:

Cheers

entry.title: Designing Script-Based Pop-Up Variable Screens with Mandatory Field Selection in SAC
entry.content:
Brief Snapshot

The Best Run Bike model was used as the model in the study.

Introduction

Hello! Have you ever faced a situation where precise variable selection is mandatory to ensure accurate data display in your reports? If you answer yes, in this blog I’ll walk you through an interactive popup-based variable selection screen in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). The example covers a scenario where users must select Country and Customer Status before continuing, ensuring better data relevance and user experience.

Let’s explore this hands-on implementation step by step, breaking down the scripting logic behind creating this functionality.

Why Use a Variable Screen?

Variable screens in SAC are essential for guiding users to make the right data selections before interacting with dashboards. By using a popup for variable selection:

  • Data accuracy is improved by forcing mandatory selections.
  • System performance is optimized by reducing unnecessary queries.
  • User experience is enhanced by providing a clear, guided process.

This method is especially useful in scenarios where filtering data by key dimensions (like Country or Customer Status) is critical for business decisions.

Key Functionalities

Here’s what we’ll achieve:

  1. A popup screen to select Country, Customer Status, and optionally Sales Agent.
  2. Validation to ensure mandatory fields are filled before applying the filters.
  3. Data refresh controls to prevent backend queries while the popup is open.
  4. Efficient application of user selections via scripting.

Step-by-Step Implementation

1. Filling the Dropdowns

Page_Screen oninitialization codes:

 

 

//open Popup_Screen
Popup_Screen.open();

//call function which fills dropdowns
VariableObjects.fillVariableDropdowns();

//call function which pause widgets refresh on the initial state
VariableObjects.pauseOn();

 

 

The values in the dropdown lists are taken from the current data set and added to the corresponding list. For this, the fillVariableDropdowns() function is defined.

This function takes the Country, Customer Status, and Sales Agent fields from the data source and adds them to the dropdowns accordingly. This way, when users open the popup, they can see all the options for that field.
Dropdown Information:

  

fillVariableDropdowns() function:

 

 

//Create variables selected for Country, selected2 for Sales Agent and selected3 for Customer Status variables
var selected = Table_13.getDataSource().getMembers("Country");
var selected2= Table_13.getDataSource().getMembers("Sales_Agent");
var selected3= Table_13.getDataSource().getMembers("Customer_Status");

//Related members are added to the dropdown of each variable
if(selected.length>0) {
	for( var i=0; i<selected.length; i++) {
		Dropdown_Country.addItem(selected[i].id, selected[i].description);
	}
}

if(selected2.length>0) {
	for( var k=0; k<selected2.length; k++) {
		Dropdown_SalesAgent.addItem(selected2[k].id,selected2[k].description);
	}
}

if(selected3.length>0) {
	for( var j=0; j<selected3.length; j++) {
		Dropdown_CustStatus.addItem(selected3[j].id,selected3[j].description);
	}
}

 

 

2. Controlling Data Refresh

To improve performance and avoid unnecessary backend queries, data refresh is paused while the popup is active.

pauseOn: Pauses the refresh for all widgets (tables, charts, etc.).

 

 

Table_12.getDataSource().setRefreshPaused(PauseMode.On);
Chart_10.getDataSource().setRefreshPaused(PauseMode.On);
Table_13.getDataSource().setRefreshPaused(PauseMode.On);

 

pauseOff: Resumes the refresh once the user completes their selections.

Table_12.getDataSource().setRefreshPaused(PauseMode.Off);
Chart_10.getDataSource().setRefreshPaused(PauseMode.Off);
Table_13.getDataSource().setRefreshPaused(PauseMode.Off);

3. Handling User Actions

The popup includes three buttons:

  1. Set: Applies the user’s selections and closes the popup.
  2. Cancel: Closes the popup without making any changes.
  3. Reset Selections: Resets the selections in the dropdowns.

Set Button Logic

When the Set button is clicked:

  • Selections are validated to ensure mandatory fields are not empty.
  • If validation fails, error messages are shown, and the popup remains open.
  • On success, filters are applied to the widgets, and data refresh is resumed.

Cancel Button Logic

Close the popup screen.

 

 

Popup_Screen - onButtonClick


//Country and Customer status selections are mandatory, Sales Agent is not.
//If the selection is empty, it stops the page refresh.

//The code block that runs when the Set button was clicked
if(buttonId === "buttonSet") {

	//get selections of dropdowns
	var selectedCountry=Dropdown_Country.getSelectedKey();
	var selectedAgent= Dropdown_SalesAgent.getSelectedKey();
	var selectedStatu= Dropdown_CustStatus.getSelectedKey();
	
	//If Country and Customer Status are not selected
	if(selectedCountry===undefined && selectedStatu===undefined) {
		Popup_Screen.open();
		Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Error,"Country selection is mandatory.");
		Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Error,"Customer Status selection is mandatory.");
		VariableObjects.pauseOn();      //Stops the refresh.
	}
	
	//Only if the Country is not selected
	else if(selectedCountry===undefined) {
		Popup_Screen.open();
		Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Error,"Country selection is mandatory.");
		VariableObjects.pauseOn();      //Stops the refresh.
	}
	
	
	//Only if the Customer Status not selected.
	else if(selectedStatu===undefined) {
		Popup_Screen.open();
		Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Error,"Customer Status selection is mandatory.");
		VariableObjects.pauseOn();      //Stops the refresh.
	}
	
	//If Country and Customer Status are both selected and Sales Agent selection is up to the user and selected
	else {
			Table_12.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Country", selectedCountry);
			Chart_10.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Country", selectedCountry);
			Table_13.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Country", selectedCountry);
		
			Table_12.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Customer_Status", selectedStatu);
			Chart_10.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Customer_Status", selectedStatu);
			Table_13.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Customer_Status", selectedStatu);
		
			Table_12.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Sales_Agent",selectedAgent);
			Chart_10.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Sales_Agent",selectedAgent);
			Table_13.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Sales_Agent",selectedAgent);

			VariableObjects.pauseOff();
			Popup_Screen.close();
	}
}

//Runs when the Cancel button was clicked
if(buttonId === "buttonCancel")  {
	Popup_Screen.close();
}

 

 

Reset Selections Button Logic

Resets the selections in dropdowns.

 

 

Dropdown_Country.setSelectedKey("undefined");
Dropdown_SalesAgent.setSelectedKey("undefined");
Dropdown_CustStatus.setSelectedKey("undefined");

 

 

Variable Screen Button Logic

With the Variable Screen button on the page, the popup with the Variable screen is made visible.

 

 

//onClick
Popup_Screen.open();

 

 

Real-Time Usage

When implemented, this logic ensures that:

  • Users cannot proceed without selecting mandatory variables.
  • Backend resources are preserved by pausing widget refresh during selection.
  • Data accuracy is maintained by applying relevant filters before any query is executed.

Conclusion

Implementing a variable screen with popups in SAC not only improves data relevance but also boosts overall performance and user satisfaction. This approach is ideal for scenarios where precise filtering is essential before any data is displayed.

I hope this guide helps you design similar solutions for your SAC projects. Stay tuned for more tips, and happy scripting!

Feel free to share your thoughts and questions in the comments below!

SAP Community SAP Analytics Cloud Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud, analytics designer

entry.title: Enhancement J1AMONITOR
entry.content:

entry.title: Re: Is there any method can upload and post API bank stat...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

sorry, but I believe, that you have not done any research. There is of course a bank statement API: https://api.sap.com/api/BANKSTATEMENTPOST_IN/overview

 

I would also propose to check with the Multi-Bank-Connectivity, if there is not already a solution in place, which doesn't need any further development from your side.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.content:
After the most recent update, I've noticed there are strange behaviours coming from activating trace in IS, in particular, I can't seem to activate Trace level logs in the following iFlow. It remains as Log Level: Info for any runs that I do:

even if the current configuration should be on Trace: 

 I have tried to redeploy the iFlow, put the log level in debug, error and info then back to Trace.

 

Nothing changes.

 

Is anyone having the same issue? Any input or help would be appreciated!

entry.title: Re: /SCWM/RACC_IMP_ERP_UI - Time out Dump
entry.content:
Hello Chris, Thanks for responding.

When we tried to pass single object or range of object, then its working.

But when we try without that then its not working.

We have tons of Work orders and WBS elements in our ERP system. Hence we cannot put range to fetch it.

We need to run this report by keeping it blank and fetch all valid cost objects to EWM.

Do we have any solution for this?

Also if new cost object gets introduced in ERP and we want to transfer only this cost object to EWM then how can we do this ? 

I dint find any change pointer program for this.

Thanks,

Onkar

entry.title: Re: Direct link to a SAP Enable Now Glossary
entry.content:
Hi Bart,

OK, I think I understand the issue.  If you are referring to the way that the content plays back, then they are different.  When I playback a glossary accessed under the Glossary button in a library I see something like:

 

 

 

 

 


If I playback the same library using a direct link I see:

 

 

 

 

So, they don't look the same but I'm still able to access the glossary using a direct link.  I'm not sure that there is any way to get the library to look like the version that auto opens up when it is accessed by the library button on a library.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Bottleneck work center to multiple operations
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert,

I assigned bottleneck work center to multiple operations in a routing. For example, I assigned work center (WC1) to operation 0010 and 0020. Now when I want to schedule capacity using Capacity Scheduling Table app for operation 0020 I cannot as SAP only considers the lowest operation 0010 for capacity scheduling even if the 0020 is a bottleneck. 

How can i schedule operation 0020 in Capacity scheduling table app or both 0010 and 0020 when both are being worked on same bottleneck work center WC1.

entry.title: Focused insights tactical dashboard data validation for Solution manager 7.2 SP18
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How to validate the focused insights tactical dashboards data for solution manager 7.2 SP18

Below link is applicable to Solution manager 7.1..How to check the same for 7.2

what are the data providers for focused insights tactical dashboards monitoring category wise..how to check them

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/focused-insights-tactical-dashboard-data-validation/ba-p/13301096

SM_WORKCENTER ==> Technical Monitoring ==> Interactive Reporting ==> (select the system ID) ==> System Reports

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: // How to retrieve payload based on message id in cpi //
entry.content:
Hi @Rakesh1610 

The answer to your questions is complex.
Important Note: a) SAP Cloud Integration does not log the payload for the messages unless TRACE is explicitly enabled (TRACE will only last 10 min, and the data will be removed after 60 min). b) SAP Cloud Integration has a flexible pipeline: this means you can have one or many source payloads, one or many intermediate payloads, one or many enriched payloads, one or many transformed payloads, and one or many target payloads, all linked to the same message-id.

Yes. You can use APIs or UI to download the payload from a specific message-and-step.

Documentation: https://api.sap.com/api/MessageProcessingLogs/path/get_MessageProcessingLogs___MessageGuid___

Please find an example

Step 1: Use message-id
/api/v1/MessageProcessingLogs('your-message-id-here')

Step 2: Navigate to Runs to get RunId
/api/v1/MessageProcessingLogs('your-message-id')/Runs

Step 3: Navigate to RunSteps
/api/v1/MessageProcessingLogRuns('your-run-id-here')/RunSteps

Step 4: $filter or select a "child" based on your stepId or other criteria
/api/v1/MessageProcessingLogRunSteps(RunId='your-run-id-here',ChildCount=your-child-count)/TraceMessages

Step 5: Navigate to value using TraceId to extract the payload.
/api/v1/TraceMessages(your-TraceId-here)/$value

I hope this helps you. Keep integrating 🖖🏻

Best regards,

Ricardo

entry.title: Re: Error 403 when Create Sales Order using API_SALES_ORD...
entry.content:
Hi @WG23 

The reason it works on your Postman and fails on your system is that Postman automatically forwards the session cookies, but your system is not reusing the session.

You can solve this by forwarding all the cookies.

Note: I recommend using SAP Cloud Integration to integrate your systems. Cloud Integration handles all of these connections to SAP with out-of-the-box functionality.

Best regards 🖖🏻

Ricardo

entry.title: SAP Fiori My Inbox URL generation for intent-based object navigation
entry.content:
Dear expert, 

I'm working on migrating UWL task list to Fiori My Inbox and referring KBA 2274940 - URL generation for intent-based navigation

I'm launching via SAP Work Zone Fiori Inbox Cloud - default webgui / wda

I'm able to configure Open Task via SWFVISU transaction which open the task in a new tab. However, the link in the Related Object tab fails to open the page. 

Configuration has been setup in SWFVISU for Object Visualization. The link generated upon clicked generated as below. The query parameter P_INSTID is generated with encoded value. I tried remove the encoded value manually and the page was able to load correctly. 

https://workzone.host#QMSMObject-process?P_INSTID=%EF%BB%BF0002000021110001%EF%BB%BF&P_CATID=BO&P_TYPEID=QMSM&P_METHOD=DISPLAY

From the web developer tools network response, the parameter is encoded with "Control character zero width no-break space". 

Debug from backend, the field actually returned correct value without any space. 

 

Any idea is there any configuration that I could missed out?

Regards,

Ben

#MyInbox #Fiori #URLGeneration #ObjectVisualization

entry.title: SAC Delete user - user has been setup as an External Connection

I am a SAP Security person so have all user admin permissions/rights in SAC systems.

Thanks

entry.title: ECPAYの通知メールを取得できる権限
entry.content:
いつもお世話になっております。

 

ECPAYの通知メールを取得したいのですが、通知メール取得設定欄にECPAYが表示されません。

 

どの権限があったらECPAYの通知メールを取得できるのでしょうか？


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: ECPAYの通知メールを取得できる権限
entry.content:
ご担当者様：

平素よりお世話になっております。

ECPAYの通知メールを取得したいの場合、KBA 2900069 - How S-users manage their own Cloud Notification subscriptions - SAP for Me を参考して、設定いただければ、関連するメールを受け取れます。

お手数をおかけしますが、ご確認するようにお願い申し上げます。

宜しくお願い致します。

以上

SAP サポート

entry.title: Re: FBCJ - Cash journal
entry.content: in this case, make sure your Cash Journal config (FBCJC0) contains the respective GL account is assigned. This is where all the transactions are going to record.

you can choose GL account hierarchy or FSV defined in Fiori app: Manage Global Hierarchy

entry.title: Re: invisible Import settings for public dimension SAP SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

Perhaps it's because for public dimensions,

such as materials, cost centers, profit centers,

they are master data, and more constant, don't not get changed as much as transaction data imported to model.

and you have variety of ways to import data, including excel upload.

Regards,

Sen

entry.title: Item Cost Not Displaying for a Specific User
entry.content:
One of our users is experiencing an issue where the Item Cost column does not display in the list of items, even though it is already selected in the Form Settings.

We’ve verified that this works fine for other users, so it seems to be isolated to this particular user. We also tried using View > Fit Column Width, but the column still does not appear.

How do we should take to resolve this?

entry.title: Re: It has never been easier to print from SAP with Microsoft Universal Print
entry.content: Hi @Martin-Pankraz - Thanks for the response! I would appreciate a quick sync on this - from my understanding, access method G is not supported in case of SAP Fiori applications integrating with SAP S/4HANA Output Management. Printing using the browser printing features seems to be valid option, only if supported by the respective Fiori app (e.g. if the app provides a PDF Preview). Interested in your opinion on "Frontend" printing if the Fiori app "integrates" with SAP S/4HANA Output Management but does not offer a dedicated PDF preview allowing a browser-based printing. Will drop you a PM. Cheers! Martin

entry.title: Re: No option "Custom application" in Create Extension wi...
entry.content:
Hi,

In the Help Portal, it only lists three functions:

Use the Create Extension extensibility wizard in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to create:

  • Custom Field: Add a custom field to an existing business object.
  • Custom Logic: Modify standard business processes with custom logic to enhance efficiency and fulfill unique organizational requirements.
  • Custom Process: Automate processes and tasks using SAP Build.

I think maybe in current release, there are only 3 available functions.

Best Regards,

Zhehui

entry.title: Re: How to restrict outbound delivery with respect to ser...
entry.content:
The material which use the serial number, it must be assigned a serial number profile (In material material data: MM03 -> "work scheduling" or "General Plant Data / Storage 1" , the serial number profile will be maintained), pls check the background configuration of "serial number profile".

T-code: OIS2

Path： Plant Maintenance and Customer Service-> Master Data in Plant Maintenance and Customer Service-> Technical Objects-> Equipment -> Serial Number Management->Define Serial Number Profiles

And Check the filed of “Stock” whether is “2”, when you choose "2" for this filed, it will check the stock exist or not.

entry.title: Enhancing Financial Management with SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408.3
entry.content:
As professionals in the advanced realm of SAP, it is crucial to keep abreast of the developments that can significantly impact your business processes. The latest SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408.3 (HFC9) release introduces vital enhancements in Finance, focusing specifically on Management Accounting and Margin Analysis.

Advanced Substitution/Validation Hierarchies

This release introduces a notable feature within the [Substitution/Validation Hierarchies]. The feature is designed to provide a more rigorous framework for financial verification through the "Manage Substitution/Validation Rules - Journal Entries" application. This functionality now allows users to meticulously assess Journal Entry Items against defined node hierarchies in Cost Centers and GL Accounts. The feature enhances the integrity of financial processes by ensuring compliance with organizational standards and structures.

With this addition, financial controllers can verify that any cost center or general ledger account used in journal entries aligns with defined hierarchies. This is essential for maintaining the accuracy and reliability of financial postings, thereby upholding the quality and precision of financial management.

Comprehensive Management of Allocations

The updated [“Manage Allocations (New Version) (F3338A)” app] offers a sophisticated solution for managing allocation cycles. This feature builds on the capabilities of its predecessor by providing an improved, clearer interface that enhances user experience while maintaining robust control over financial allocations.

Users are now able to view a full overview of allocation cycles and their associated segments with enhanced visualization. While no modifications can be made in the new version to preserve data integrity, all pertinent details are readily accessible for analysis. Financial managers still have the flexibility to switch to the previous version when adjustments are necessary, ensuring that your financial operations remain adaptable to your unique business needs.

This new version allows you to display cycles and segments, but not change them. To make changes to allocation cycles, continue using Manage Allocations (F3338).

 

Conclusion: 

The SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408.3 release continues to fortify SAP's commitment to providing cutting-edge solutions for financial management. By incorporating these advanced features into your organizational workflows, businesses can strive towards a future of enhanced efficiency, accuracy, and strategic financial insight. Integrating these enhancements paves the way for more streamlined financial processes, offering unprecedented control and visibility.

For any organization aiming to stay ahead in the competitive business landscape, leveraging these features is essential to achieve superior financial management outcomes.

For any further assistance or queries, feel free to contact your SAP consultant or reach out to the SAP community for additional insights.

entry.title: pcr payroll
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Please help. Im new to PCR and learning the basics. 

I need to write a PCR to read amount from a certain wage type (ex: WT 1000) in input table and multiply it with the number of any other wage type(ex: WT 1001) and store in WT1000. if the amount is greater than 50,000 then add it to output table. 

*

****

1001

ADDWT&NUM

ADDWT*

1000 

ADDWT&AMT

MULTI NAA

ADDWT *

AMT>50000

ADDWT*

i wrote this and it doesnt work.

entry.title: How to configure T042E_WANFF(Number of Days Until Bill of Exchange Pmnt Request Due Date)
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I would appreciate it so much if you would take the time to read and answer my question. 


■Customer requirement
I'm currently customizing the bill of exchange process for Japan in S/4HANA Public Cloud. The customer requirement is to change the due date for BOE payable (see the table below) based on vendors. The span from the posting date can be 1 to 3 months, but it depends on the vendors. (In the case of the table below, the span is 1 month.)
 

MMDDYYYYActionDue Date
12/16/2024Posting an invoice with the payment method O(for BOE)01/31/2025
01/31/2025Running an Automatic Payment Program to post a BOE for the invoice02/28/2025
02/28/2025Clearing the BOE-

 

 


■How I'm trying to deal with it 
For this requirement, I'm currently trying to configure T042E_WANFF in Set Up Payment Methods per Company Code for Payment Transactions(101044) so that I can configure the span for each payment method and then properly assign them to vendors.
■The problem that I have
Is there any way for activating this item? It seems perferct for this requirement, but somehow unavailable to change right now.(Please refer to the image attached.)


Another option would be to maintain terms of payment to have two dates : one is for the invoice, and the other is for the BoE.

Thank you,


Kaito

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite Trace Level is not working
entry.content:
Hi 

I am also facing similar issue in Google chrome, Try to use in Edge it is working.

entry.title: View the execution plan of SAC widgets/ charts
entry.content:
Hello experts,
   I currently using SAC with a Live Connection to my SAP HANA database. When I create a Chart in SAC to view my data, sometimes I get the error "Fail to fetch data" (It has occurred randomly, not all the times) <See the image attached below>.
   The chart is about getting the Top 5 Best Sales Products by Quantity. The data source has about 2 million rows of data, and the Chart also uses the filter to remove the unnecessary products. I wonder whether the errors occurred because my server did not meet the resource requirement to query the data or because it was a SAC issue. So I want to view the execution plan, and query of each Chart/ Widget to run that query under my HANA server. Is there any solution? ( I found that SAC only has the Analyze Story Performance in View Time option to track the time of each Widget, but does not have the execution plan).
I appreciate your help.
Best regards,

Nguyen Thanh Hieu

entry.title: How to connect BPA form with on premise S4 Hana?
